author: svTa
content: Completed: Merged prior work, fixed all R2 hater findings. (1) Added psycopg2 + pytest-postgresql to environment-unpinned.yaml. (2) Made pytest_postgresql import conditional in fixtures.py. (3) Created test/storage/conftest.py for pg fixture discovery. (4) Reverted response_status and duration to Integer in sqlalchemy_schema.py. (5) Capped test_values.py ranges to 2^31-1. (6) Replaced bare except on rollback with proper logging.
